scripts.dev: concurrently -n sentinel,ui -c magenta,cyan "npm -w sentinel run dev" "npm -w watchtower run dev"
scripts.dev:demo: cross-env DEMO_SIM=1 concurrently -n sentinel,ui -c magenta,cyan "npm -w sentinel run dev" "npm -w watchtower run dev"
scripts.build:packages: npm -w overseer run build && npm -w panopticon-cli run build
scripts.build:web: npm -w sentinel run build && npm -w watchtower run build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:web
scripts.smoke: npm run build && npm -w panopticon-cli run smoke
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run smoke
scripts.test:packages: npm -w overseer test && npm -w panopticon-cli test
scripts.test:web: npm -w sentinel test && npm -w watchtower test
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:web
scripts.test:coverage: npm -w sentinel run test:coverage && npm -w watchtower run test:coverage
